description: Default location: ~/.invoker/config.json. For repo-specific configs, set INVOKER_REPO_CONFIG_PATH when launching Invoker.

ssh.comment: SshExecutor uses per-target settings from remoteTargets

staging-server.comment: Managed SSH target configuration for remote execution

build-server-b.comment: Second SSH target for running different tasks on a different host

mixed-local-ssh.comment: Pool routes tasks across mixed SSH/local members with shared queue/drain semantics

pnpm-ssh.comment: Pool for pnpm commands that should run only on SSH machines

executorRoutingRules.comment: Route pnpm commands to the SSH-only pool before defaultPoolId applies

notes.fetch_behavior: Git fetch failures always abort the task. Fix the underlying network/auth issue and rerun.
notes.review_gate_ci_repair: The built-in ci-failure worker and repair-review-gate-ci use autoFixRetries as their retry budget for workflow-mapped, non-conflicting review gates. pr-ci-failure-scan should discover failing PRs and then hand repair to query/repair-review-gate-ci; it is not a separate fixer or plan schema.
